# Support

Thanks for your interest in Coral!

If you need help using, building, or contributing to Coral, please join our Discord server.

## Discord

For support, questions, and general discussion, join our Discord community:

> **Discord:** [Join Coral's Discord](https://discord.gg/B2BgjwDX8m)

Whether you're setting up Coral, developing with it, or just curious about the project, you're welcome to ask questions there.

## Reporting Bugs

If you've found a reproducible bug, please open a GitHub Issue instead of asking in Discord.

When reporting a bug, include:

- Coral version or commit hash
- Operating system
- Rust version (`rustc --version`)
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected behavior
- Actual behavior
- Relevant logs or panic messages

Providing as much detail as possible helps us reproduce and fix the issue more quickly.

## Feature Requests

If you have an idea that would improve Coral, feel free to open a Feature Request on GitHub.

Please describe:

- The problem you're trying to solve
- Your proposed solution
- Any alternatives you've considered

## Security

Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities publicly.

Instead, follow the instructions in `SECURITY.md`.

Thank you for helping make Coral better!
